title: aster sibiricus subsp. pygmaeus
intro: Aster sibiricus subsp. pygmaeus, also known as the Siberian dwarf aster, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Aster sibiricus subsp. pygmaeus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant effects, making it a promising natural remedy for various diseases. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
